zh.lifeSummary: 當John Reynell於1280年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾特朗平頓時，他的父親Walter Reynell V37歲，母親Maud de Trumpington26歲。他於1320年與Maud DeFulborne在英國坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1364年在英國戴文貝爾斯同享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Reynell于1280年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾特朗平頓时，他的父亲Walter Reynell V37岁，母亲Maud de Trumpington26岁。他于1320年与Maud DeFulborne在英国坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1364年在英国戴文貝爾斯同享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Reynold
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Reinald, Reynaud (ancient Germanic Raginald, from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + wald ‘rule, ruler’), first introduced to England by Scandinavian settlers in the Old Norse form Rögnvaldr (see Ronald ) and greatly reinforced after the Conquest by the Norman forms Reinald and Reynaud, which often appear Latinized as Reginaldus. The surname was later much confused with Raynor and Renard . The surname is occasionally also borne by Jews, in which case it presumably represents an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Reynell was born in 1280, in Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Reynell V, was 37 and his mother, Maud de Trumpington, was 26. He married Maud DeFulborne in 1320, in Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1364, in Belstone, Devon, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Reynell est né en 1280, à Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Reynell V, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Maud de Trumpington, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Maud DeFulborne en 1320, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1364, à Belstone, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Reynell 1280 in Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Reynell V 37 und seine Mutter Maud de Trumpington 26. Er hat 1320 in Cambridgeshire, England Maud DeFulborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1364 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Belstone, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Reynell è nato il nel 1280 nel Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Reynell V, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Trumpington, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Maud DeFulborne nel 1320, nel Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1364, nel Belstone, Devon, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Reynell(이)가 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 트럼핀그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Reynell V(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Trumpington(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1320년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 Maud DeFulborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1364년 영국 데폰 벨스톤에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Reynell родился в 1280 г. в местности трумпингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Reynell V было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Trumpington, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud DeFulborne в 1320 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1364 г. в местности белстоун, девон, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.
